name: Safari
description: A Safari browser mockup component that wraps content in a realistic browser chrome, complete with address bar, navigation buttons, and window controls.
whenToUse: Use for product screenshots, app previews, website showcases, or any demo content that looks better framed in a browser window.

props.name: url
props.description: URL displayed in the browser address bar

props.name: src
props.description: Image source URL for the browser content
